sentences.arabic: التَّغْذِيَةُ الصِّحِّيَّةُ تُسَاعِدُ الْجِسْمَ عَلَى النُّمُوِّ وَالْقُوَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zdrava ishrana pomaže tijelu pri rastu i snazi.
sentences.translationEn: Healthy nutrition helps the body with growth and strength.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَأْكُلَ الْفَوَاكِهَ وَالْخُضْرَاوَاتِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى الْفِيتَامِينَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo jesti voće i povrće svaki dan kako bismo unijeli vitamine.
sentences.translationEn: We must eat fruit and vegetables every day to get vitamins.

sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ بِكَمِّيَّاتٍ كَافِيَةٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِحِمَايَةِ الصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje dovoljne količine vode je neophodno za očuvanje zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking water in sufficient quantities is necessary to protect health.
